acceptance_criteria:
1. UnionResolution enum with Resolved and Ambiguous variants
2. UnionResolver type alias for fn pointer
3. default_union_resolver implementing scoring algorithm
4. Class overlap scoring works
5. Enum variant matching works
6. Handles tie-breaking (returns Ambiguous on tie)
7. Unit tests for resolution scenarios
8. cargo test passes

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Edge case decisions:
- Tie-breaker: if scores tie, pick first branch in union declaration order
- Recursive aliases: resolve via world.types before scoring
- Empty class (no fields): score 0 (matches nothing)
- All-optional class with no fields present in value: score 0
- Null value: matches null branch if present, else Ambiguous

title: Implement UnionResolver type and default algorithm
